title: Delicate British Turkey Neck Skewers
description: A romantic British dish featuring malty and silky turkey neck, lacquer-glazed to perfection, and grilled on a robata-grill for a unique flavor experience, this anti-inflammatory friendly recipe is perfect for a special dinner
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Thread the turkey neck onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt syrup, olive oil, honey, apple cider vinegar, ginger powder, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Brush the mixture onto the turkey neck, making sure to coat all surfaces evenly
Grill the skewers for 15 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the turkey reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit
During the last 2 minutes of cooking, brush the skewers with the lacquer glaze
Remove the skewers from the grill and garnish with chopped fresh thyme
